title: Reporting Phishing or Suspicious Emails
text:
Q: How do I report a phishing or suspicious email?
A: If you receive a phishing or suspicious email, do not click on any links or download attachments. First, forward the email to our IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com with the subject line 'Phishing Report'. Include any relevant details, such as how you received the email and why you find it suspicious. After reporting, delete the email from your inbox. If you accidentally clicked on a link or provided any personal information, please contact the helpdesk immediately for further assistance. Your vigilance helps keep our company safe from cyber threats.
